summary: CDC exposes several HTTP APIs: two public no-auth endpoints (Content Services at tools.cdc.gov/api and CDC WONDER POST queries at wonder.cdc.gov/controller/datarequest/{database ID}), one documented API-key-protected endpoint (NIO Autocoder via `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key` obtained by emailing NIOCCS), and additional listed HTTP APIs (MVPS Reports External API, HAIC CDI API, and EWS Person API) whose exact auth mechanics remain undocumented in the recorded sources.

surfaces.name: CDC WONDER API for Data Query Web Service
